hero.subtitle: Collect, organize, and prioritize user feedback effortlessly. Build products your customers actually want with our all-in-one feedback management platform.

features.heading: Everything You Need
features.subheading: Powerful features to manage feedback at scale

collection.title: Feedback Collection
collection.desc: Gather insights from customers through customizable feedback boards and forms

voting.title: Smart Voting System
voting.desc: Let users upvote features they want most to prioritize your roadmap effectively

roadmap.title: Visual Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Share your product roadmap publicly and keep customers in the loop

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.desc: Keep users engaged with automated updates on their feedback status

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.desc: Track trends, measure engagement, and make data-driven decisions

multitenant.title: Multi-Tenant Support
multitenant.desc: Manage multiple workspaces with custom domains and branding

how.heading: How Does it Work?
how.subheading: Get your personalized feedback portal in 4 steps
how.step1Title: Sign up and create your workspace
how.step1Desc: Start with our magical setup wizard to get your feedback portal ready in minutes
how.step2Desc: Choose your primary and secondary colors, add your logo, and make it yours
how.step3Desc: Share your feedback board link and start collecting valuable insights
how.step4Desc: Export data in various formats, integrate with your tools, and build better products

testimonials.heading: Loved by Product Teams
testimonials.subheading: What people are saying about Feedbase
testimonials.quote1: Feedbase transformed how we collect and prioritize user feedback. The voting system is brilliant!
testimonials.quote2: Setup took less than 5 minutes. The interface is clean and our customers love it!
testimonials.quote3: The analytics dashboard gives us insights we never had before. Highly recommend!

team.seatLimit: You've reached your plan's team limit
team.subtitle: Everyone in this workspace. A workspace has one owner; everybody else is a member.
team.inviteDesc: They'll get an email with a secure link to join this workspace as a member. The link expires in 7 days and can only be used once.

tags.subtitle: Organize and categorize feedback posts
tags.empty: No tags yet. Create one to start categorizing feedback.
tags.dialogDesc: Tags help categorize and filter feedback.

branding.logoHint: Shown in the header of your public board. A square PNG or SVG works best.

roadmap.addDesc: Place a feedback post onto a roadmap column.

authAside.heading: Turn user feedback into your competitive advantage.
authAside.subtitle: Join thousands of product teams who use Feedbase to understand what their customers really want and build products that win.
authAside.centralizeDesc: Collect feature requests, bug reports, and ideas in one organized space your team can access anytime.
authAside.prioritizeDesc: Let your users vote on what matters most, so you build features that drive real impact.
authAside.roadmapDesc: Keep customers engaged with a public roadmap and changelog that shows you're listening.

loginPage.heading: Sign in and continue shipping better decisions.

signupPage.heading: Join Feedbase and collect product feedback with clarity.

postDetail.deleteDesc: This permanently removes the post along with its votes and comments. This action cannot be undone.
postDetail.deleteProTitle: Deleting feedback requires the Pro plan
postDetail.deleteProToast: Deleting feedback is a Pro feature

postDetail.contactUpsell: to see who submitted this feedback and email them when it's implemented.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account permanently?
deleteAccount.warn: This cannot be undone. Please read carefully.
deleteAccount.ownedErased: All of their feedback, comments, roadmap and changelog will be erased, every member loses access, and any active subscription is cancelled.
deleteAccount.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account. Workspaces you own are deleted with it, along with all of their feedback, roadmap, and changelog. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.ownedCount_one: {{count}} workspace you own will be deleted
deleteAccount.ownedCount_other: {{count}} workspaces you own will be deleted
deleteAccount.joinedCount_one: You'll be removed from {{count}} shared workspace
deleteAccount.joinedCount_other: You'll be removed from {{count}} shared workspaces
deleteAccount.joinedKeep: {{names}} — these workspaces keep their data; your posts and comments there stay but become anonymous.
